Patch Set 3:

Replaced by  https://review.whamcloud.com/37088

parents.subject: LU-12368 ptlrpc: make DEBUG_REQ messages consistent

commit.subject: LU-12325 dom: use LCK_PR with 'trylock' mode
commit.message:
LU-12325 dom: use LCK_PR with 'trylock' mode

DOM lock at open has three possible values - never, always
and trylock. 'Always' mode takes DOM bit depending on open
mode - PW or PR, but 'trylock' mode could use less strict
PR mode always to get DOM bit in more cases.

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: Ief5136d70b73d88c74b04e2f007d07a8a6965109
